caption: The video features a woman sitting at a desk with a laptop in front of her, set against a solid orange background. She is dressed in a black blazer over a yellow and black patterned blouse, accessorized with a necklace and earrings. Her hands are clasped together on the desk, and she appears to be speaking or presenting, as suggested by her changing facial expressions and slight head movements. The laptop has several colorful stickers on it, adding a personal touch to the otherwise professional setting. The logo "Cointelegraph" is visible in the top right corner, indicating that the content may be related to cryptocurrency or blockchain technology. The overall atmosphere suggests an informative or educational presentation.
